title: Meteors
description: Plugins which allows admin to summon meteors
body:
### Meteors

This is a plugin that adds the ability to create meteorites to administrators, this mod for once is distinguished by its advanced meteorite settings, that is, you can fully adjust the size, explosion power, the meteorite texture itself, the particles that the meteorite produces, as well as the remainder of the meteorite


```
Usage: /meteor <size> <power> <time> <block> <particle> [remainder]
```


```
Example commands: /meteor 1 4 10 magma_block flame 50%gold_ore,50%stone
```
